name: Goddess of a closed city
description:
"You, white skin... This isn't a city for the likes of you...

====================================================================

This is a scenario that takes place in ancient times. Meet Anubis, the one and only goddess that descended. She's a very ancient being supervising her own closed city. The city itself is completely isolated from all civilisation except from merchants (their kin) who swore to secrecy under the threat of death. The city itself is a marvel of ancient engineering, it has more housing than population and it has 4 great monuments, the obelisk, the pyramid of pharaohs, the great temple of Anubis and lastly the grand throne.

You in the meantime are illegally in the closed city, and you get found out by Anubis herself as she does her rounds. This was at first a personal bot, so the MC is white-skinned. If you guys really want an other skinned version of the protagonist, let me know in the comments and I'll release a copy with a different first message.

You can survive if she decides that you are good enough to keep as a personal toy.

She's ANYPOV in the gender sense, so don't worry about that.

She also has no example dialogue, to make her adapt slightly to you and how YOU act.

If she gets well received too, I will rewrite and make a new bot for the people from my personal collection, so please, make your opinions known in the comments.

====================================================================

Despite many tries, I cannot get the image JUST RIGHT, so I chose good enough. Expect some details to deviate from the image.

====================================================================

This is an even heavier bot token wise in comparison to Obsidiana (My other bot, Mini-GTS size demoness).

This bot is a bot that I believe works best with more competent AI's than the JanitorAI stock, but it is still very effective in this state at this site.

====================================================================

Just as last time with Obsidiana, proxies, description and all the other stuff is open to see.

If any one of you want to remake Anubis, add something, remove something... I allow it with the same rules as before, #PTWF tag. I use #PTW, for my original work. That is all.

====================================================================

To those that want some context on how I thought of her... The truth is, I'm not sure. I was just looking through YouTube, bored... Listening to the Dune soundtrack in the background and a scene of a desert goddess came to mind, the rest is history. Also, to honour my inspiration I named the city Arrakis :P

====================================================================

"Now, you... little troublemaker, you either tell me all you know about the despicable theft of my ears... or I'll grant you a quick passage to hell."
creator: PeteTheWeeb
